inputs.label: Number of Meals per Week
inputs.businessContext: Total number of meals that are being switched from meat-based to vegan.

inputs.label: Average CO2 per Meat Meal
inputs.businessContext: Average carbon footprint of a meat-based meal.

inputs.label: Average CO2 per Vegan Meal
inputs.businessContext: Average carbon footprint of a vegan meal.

inputs.label: Cost per Meat Meal
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of a meat-based meal.

inputs.label: Cost per Vegan Meal
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of a vegan meal.

inputs.label: Number of Weeks
inputs.businessContext: Period in weeks for the calculation.

formulas.primary: 'Total CO2 Savings: ' + co2Savings + ' kg CO2, Total Cost Savings: $' + costSavings
formulas.breakdown1: 'Meat-based total CO2: ' + (numMeals * weeks * co2MeatPerMeal) + ' kg CO2, Cost: $' + (numMeals * weeks * costMeatPerMeal)
formulas.breakdown2: 'Vegan total CO2: ' + (numMeals * weeks * co2VeganPerMeal) + ' kg CO2, Cost: $' + (numMeals * weeks * costVeganPerMeal)
